title: Create historical timelines in Monday.com
excerpt: Monday.com is SO CLOSE to be able to be used as a “historical timeline” tool. It has everything needed to do this EXCEPT one very small thing. The supported date range on timeline views does not go before the year 2000. …

posts.author: emilydunlop (Emily Dunlop)
posts.cookedHtml: Monday.com is SO CLOSE to be able to be used as a “historical timeline” tool. It has everything needed to do this EXCEPT one very small thing. The supported date range on timeline views does not go before the year 2000. I’m working on a history project where I need to catalogue the chronological order of the history of a topic, and my list is PERFECT but I can’t then view it on a timeline to see how certain events relate to each other/overlap. PLEASE change the supported date range back at least 500 years so that my dates (which I’m able to go back that far in the calendar drop down in Monday.com) can be viewed in the timeline view!
